- carl@takaralend.com     This contract integrates with the HashPrime Comptroller and manages all reward disbursal and index     calculations both for the global market indices as well as individual user indices on those markets.     It is largely the same logic that compound uses, just generalized (meaning that transfers will not     fail if things can't be sent out, but the excess is accrued on the books to be sent later).     Each market has an array of configs, each with a unique emission token owned by a specific team/user.     That owner can adjust supply and borrow emissions, end times, and     This emitter also supports native assets, but keep in mind that things get complicated with multiple     owners managing a native asset emitter - one owner can drain the contract by increasing their own     Delegates admin control to the comptroller's admin (no internal admin controls).     There is a hard rule that each market should only have 1 config with a specific emission token.     Emission configs are non-removable because they hold the supplier/borrower indices and that would     cause rewards to not be disbursed properly when a config is removed.     There is a pause guardian in this contract that can immediately stop all token emissions. Accruals     still happen but no tokens will be sent out when the circuit breaker is popped. Much like the pause     guardians on the Comptroller, only the comptroller's admin can actually unpause things.","errors":{"AddressEmptyCode(address)":[{"details":"There's no code at `target` (it is not a contract)."}],"AddressInsufficientBalance(address)":[{"details":"The ETH balance of the account is not enough to perform the operation."}],"EnforcedPause()":[{"details":"The operation failed because the contract is paused."}],"ExpectedPause()":[{"details":"The operation failed because the contract is not paused."}],"FailedInnerCall()":[{"details":"A call to an address target failed. _addEmissionConfig(address,address,addre.details: Emission config must not already exist for the specified market (unique to the emission token)

params._amount: The amount of tokens to sweep, uint256.max means everything
params._tokenAddress: The address of the token to transfer

params._hToken: The market to change a config for
params._newBorrowSpeed: The borrow side emission speed denoted in the underlying emission token's decimals

params._hToken: The market to change a config for
The market to change a config for
params._newOwner: The new owner for this config

params._hToken: The market to change a config for
params._newSupplySpeed: The supply side emission speed denoted in the underlying emission token's decimals

params._borrower: The borrower whose index will be updated
params._sendTokens: Whether to send tokens as part of calculating owed rewards
Whether to send tokens as part of calculating owed rewards
params._supplier: The supplier whose index will be updated

params._hToken: The market to get a config for

params.hToken: The market to get a config for
params.index: The index of the config to get

params.hToken: The market to get a config for
params.index: The index of the config to get

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

params._borrower: The borrower whose index will be updated
params._sendTokens: Whether to send tokens as part of calculating owed rewards
Whether to send tokens as part of calculating owed rewards
params._supplier: The supplier whose index will be updated

_addEmissionConfig(address,address,addre.notice: Add a new emission configuration for a specific market

_rescueFunds(address,uint256).notice: Sweep ERC-20 tokens from the comptroller to the admin

_setEmissionCap(uint256).notice: Sets a new emission cap for supply/borrow speeds

_setPauseGuardian(address).notice: Sets a new pause guardian, callable by the CURRENT pause guardian or comptroller's admin

_unpauseRewards().notice: Unpauses and allows reward sending once again

_updateBorrowSpeed(address,address,uint2.notice: Update the borrow emissions for a given hToken + emission token pair.

_updateEndTime(address,address,uint256).notice: Update the end time for an emission campaign, must be in the future

_updateOwner(address,address,address).notice: Update the owner of a config

_updateSupplySpeed(address,address,uint2.notice: Update the supply emissions for a given hToken + emission token pair.

comptroller().notice: Comptroller this distributor is bound to

constructor.notice: construct the logic contract and initialize so that the initialize function is uncallable from the implementation and only callable from the proxy

disburseBorrowerRewards(address,address,.notice: Calculate the deltas in indices between this user's index and the global borrower index for all configs,         and accrue any owed emissions to their borrowerRewardsAccrued for this market's configs

disburseSupplierRewards(address,address,.notice: Calculate the deltas in indices between this user's index and the global supplier index for all configs,         and accrue any owed emissions to their supplierRewardsAccrued for this market's configs

emissionCap().notice: The emission cap dictates an upper limit for reward speed emission speed configs

getAllMarketConfigs(address).notice: A view to enumerate all configs for a given market, does not include index data

getConfigForMarket(address,address).notice: A view to get a config for a specific market/emission token pair

getCurrentEmissionCap().notice: A view to get the current emission caps

getCurrentOwner(address,address).notice: Get the current owner of a config

getGlobalBorrowIndex(address,uint256).notice: view to get the cached global borrow index for an hToken and emission index

getGlobalSupplyIndex(address,uint256).notice: view to get the cached global supply index for an hToken and emission index

getOutstandingRewardsForUser(address).notice: A view to enumerate a user's rewards across all markets and all emission tokens

getOutstandingRewardsForUser(address,add.notice: A view to enumerate a user's rewards across a specified market and all emission tokens for that market

initialIndexConstant().notice: The initialIndexConstant, used to initialize indexes, and taken from the Comptroller

marketConfigs(address,uint256).notice: The main data storage for this contract, holds a mapping of hToken to array

pauseGuardian().notice: The pause guardian for this contract

updateMarketBorrowIndex(address).notice: Updates the borrow indices for a given market

updateMarketBorrowIndexAndDisburseBorrow.notice: Combine the above 2 functions into one that will update the global and user borrower indexes and         disburse rewards

updateMarketSupplyIndex(address).notice: Updates the supply indices for a given market

updateMarketSupplyIndexAndDisburseSuppli.notice: Combine the above 2 functions into one that will update the global and user supplier indexes and         disburse rewards
